name: Missile Salvo
description: Launch a volley of guided missiles. Damages all targets in a 3x3 area.

name: Orbital Strike
description: Request precision orbital bombardment. Devastating single-target strike at extreme range.

name: Shield Wall
description: Activate forward shields. Reduces incoming damage by 3 for one turn.

name: Tactical Retreat
description: Disengage and reposition. Move up to 4 cells away from hostiles.
